policy: This file is the baseline for enforcing lint-lane-coverage without --dry-run. New unsuppressed issues fail; stale entries fail and should be removed.

Deterministic E2E coverage is device-bound: the plugin's real behavior is native webview isolation exercised by the Android connectedAndroidTest instrumented suite (android/src/androidTest) and the iOS WKWebView-pool XCUITest, neither of which runs as deterministic JS E2E in CI. JS-side surface is covered by src/web.test.ts. See #15245 (mobile native-webview isolation) and #13452.
